summary: Mobile responsiveness testing of GradeProphet eBay Monitor completed successfully. All 5 requested mobile features verified working on iPhone viewport (390x844). Navigation, UI elements, and interactions all functional on mobile.
passed_tests: Mobile hamburger menu opens and shows Analizar/Monitor options - PASS
eBay Monitor loads correctly on mobile viewport - PASS
Mi Watchlist section visible with 2 cards - PASS
Add card form expands and inputs work on mobile - PASS
Filter tabs (Nuevos/Fav/Todos) all clickable and functional - PASS
Listings display with images (64x64px), titles, prices, and actions - PASS
Ver en eBay and Fav buttons work on mobile - PASS
Navigation between Analizar and Monitor tabs via hamburger menu - PASS
Footer visible at bottom of page - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Responsive CSS using Tailwind breakpoints (sm:, md:, lg:) implemented correctly
Touch targets are adequate size (36px search button, 33px filter tabs)
Filter tab text shortens appropriately on mobile ('Fav' instead of 'Interesantes')
Listing images scale from 64x64 to 80x80 on larger screens
Good use of truncate class to prevent text overflow
Price badges and action links stack well on mobile
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing watchlist data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness fully tested on 390x844 viewport. Existing watchlist has 2 cards: '1986 Fleer Michael Jordan #57' (6 listings) and '1996 Topps Kobe Bryant #138' (3 listings). Stats showed 2 tarjetas, 7-8 nuevos. All mobile interactions working correctly including hamburger menu, add form, filters, and listing actions.

mobile_navigation.notes: Hamburger menu (data-testid='mobile-menu-toggle') opens/closes correctly, shows Analizar/Monitor options

ebay_monitor_mobile.notes: Stats, watchlist, search button all visible and functional on 390px width

add_card_form_mobile.notes: Form expands, inputs accept text, button clickable

listings_display_mobile.notes: Images 64x64px, titles truncated properly, prices/actions visible and clickable

filters_mobile.notes: All 3 filters (Nuevos, Fav, Todos) visible and functional
